findings.title: Structured Output
findings.recommendation: keep advertising structured output formats in --help

findings.title: Faithful Dry Run
findings.evidence: --help advertises no dry-run / simulate / check affordance
findings.recommendation: add --dry-run that performs all checks and exits without side effects

findings.title: Graceful Cancellation
findings.evidence: behavioral SIGINT analysis requires sending signals mid-run — out of scope for v1
findings.recommendation: document signal handling in --help and ensure SIGINT triggers a clean partial-result emission, not a hard abort

findings.title: Stable Schema
findings.evidence: schema stability is a meta-property over time — single-audit detection not possible
findings.recommendation: version your output schema, document additions in changelog, and never silently change a field's type or semantics

findings.title: Stable Flags
findings.recommendation: keep advertising --version so callers can detect version drift

findings.title: Signal Danger
findings.evidence: no danger or confirmation-bypass keywords found in --help
findings.recommendation: document destructive operations and confirmation-bypass flags in --help

findings.title: Token Efficiency
findings.evidence: automated token-efficiency analysis is out of scope for v1 — manual review against the principle's manifest entry required
findings.recommendation: audit --help and command output for verbosity, banners, and decoration; trim to signal-only by default

findings.title: Deterministic Ordering
findings.evidence: deterministic-ordering analysis requires multiple invocations of the same command — out of scope for v1
findings.recommendation: document output ordering guarantees in --help and run multiple invocations to compare

findings.title: Partial Failure Output
findings.evidence: partial-failure semantics require fixture-driven probing not in scope for v1
findings.recommendation: document partial-failure behavior and ensure successful items are reported even when the run fails overall

findings.title: Parseable Errors
findings.recommendation: prefix unknown-flag errors with the binary name or a recognizable label

findings.title: Non-Interactive Default
findings.evidence: non-interactive-default detection requires a </dev/null stdin probe — out of scope for v1
findings.recommendation: ensure the CLI never prompts when stdin is not a TTY; document this behavior in --help

findings.title: Idempotent Operations
findings.evidence: idempotency requires a descriptor-declared idempotent command and repeated invocation analysis — out of scope for v1
findings.recommendation: declare idempotent commands in afcli.yaml under commands.safe[] and verify repeated invocations converge
